docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, 301, HEARING ON ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDAMUS, SUBMITTED ON DEC-18-2002 BY JAMES J. MCBRIDE. MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK PETITIONER TATSUYUKI ITO'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS UNDER SUBMISSION. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE, REPORTER: LEE BATARA, CSR #3759
